metadata.description: Persistent memory for coding agents — install the Cookbook Memory plugin (recall skill + MCP tool + lifecycle hooks) into Claude Code straight from this repo, no clone required.

plugins.name: cookbook-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code (recall skill + MCP tool + fail-open lifecycle hooks), routed through the memory engine. Self-contained install: the bundle's launcher finds the cookbook-memory Python runtime on the host or bootstraps one on first use.
